name: Variations for Blue Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
- Anchovy Dressing:
- 1 oz Anchovy; mashed
- Bacon Dressing:
- 1 tbsp Bacos; ground, allowing to mellow for several hours
- Chive Dressing:
- 2 tbsp Chives; chopped, allowing to mellow for several hours
- Herb Dressing:
- 1 tsp Parsley; ground
- 1 tsp Chives; ground
- 1 tsp Marjoram; ground
Food Exchanges per serving:
- Anchovy Dressing: 1 MEAT EXCHANGE
- Bacon Dressing: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
- Chive Dressing: NONE
- Herb Dressing: NONE
CAL: 1/2 c = 56
